Title: Behind-the-Back Trick Shot
Description: Nailed an insane behind-the-back trick shot from the dugout steps. First try, no cuts. Even Eric couldn't believe it.

Title: 500ft Home Run Derby
Description: Set up a home run derby in my backyard with a pitching machine cranked to max. Three balls cleared the neighbor's fence.

Title: No-Look Double Play
Description: Turned a no-look double play at second base during our rec league game. The shortstop had no idea what happened.

Title: Knuckleball Challenge
Description: Tried to throw 10 knuckleballs in a row for strikes. Only got 3 but the movement was absolutely filthy.

Title: One-Handed Catch Compilation
Description: A full month of one-handed catches during practice. The diving one at the 2-minute mark is insane.

Title: Speed Training Montage
Description: My 6-month speed transformation. Went from 7.2 to 6.8 sixty-yard dash. Full workout breakdown included.

Title: Opposite Field Power
Description: Hit 5 opposite field bombs in a row during cage work. Coach said it was the best session he'd ever seen.

Title: Dugout Flip Challenge
Description: Recreated Eric's famous bat flip from the dugout. Added a spin move. Crowd went crazy at our high school game.

Title: Blindfolded Batting Tee
Description: Tried hitting off a tee blindfolded. The first 5 swings were terrible but then I got a rhythm going. Hilarious results.

Title: Wall Ball Drill Speed Run
Description: Timed wall ball drill — 100 throws and catches in under 3 minutes. Hands were on fire after.
